description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sideboard cabinet with a minimalist design, featuring a light wood finish and slender legs. The front face is divided into three main sections: a left door in a light gray color, a central section with two drawers in natural wood, and a right door in a dark brown or black color. The cabinet stands on four slim, straight legs, elevating it slightly above the ground. The top and sides are finished in the same light wood as the main body, giving it a cohesive appearance. The handles are small and round, subtly integrated into the design for a clean, uncluttered look.
description: A modern, light wood sideboard cabinet with two colored doors and central drawers, standing on slim legs. Features minimalist handles and a clean, geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two colored doors (gray and dark brown/black) and two central wood drawers with small round handles.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cabinet's slim profile and the continuous light wood finish on the side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, uninterrupted light wood panel with no visible handles or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the slim profile and light wood finish.
